caribbean.headline: Caribbean Conditions: Turks & Caicos
caribbean.paragraph: Turks & Caicos in the Eastern Caribbean is the highest-impact location in the Caribbean this period, with winds peaking at 22 kt and seas building to 5.8 ft with E swell at 7s periods. 84% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Haifa
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa in the Eastern Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 14 kt and seas building to 6.4 ft with W swell at 6s periods. 100% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.
